tests.name: summarizeRequest uses a single oversized mock summary pass when the external server is available
summary command-output pass/fail with Jest pass output is deterministic and skips provider calls
summarizeRequest does not wait for terminal metadata notification response
summary command-output pass/fail with Jest failure output is deterministic and lists failing tests
summary timing metadata records lock wait separately from provider duration
summary ignores legacy busy running status without retrying
summarizeRequest does not split mock summaries when aggregate status totals are large but no exact observations exist
summarizeRequest does not recurse forever when token-aware planning returns a single full-size chunk
summarizeRequest keeps oversized llama.cpp requests on the planner path without chunk leaf markers
summarizeRequest keeps using bootstrap calibration when only a legacy observed-budget ratio exists and status metrics later become unusable
runCommand saves a raw log and respects no-summarize mode when the external server is available
saveConfig reports operation-specific context when the external server is unreachable
summary keeps oversized llama.cpp requests on planner mode when direct prompt limits would reject chunking
summary hands oversized llama.cpp requests to planner mode before tokenization-based chunking would start
summary posts the preflight prompt token count in running status updates
summarizeRequest recovers malformed structured llama.cpp JSON when the expected fields are present
summarizeRequest enables per-request response_format json_schema for structured llama.cpp decisions
buildPrompt prepends promptPrefix when provided
buildPrompt wraps generated chunk slices as inert literal input
pass markers with zero failed still use the model summary path
getSummaryDecision keeps command-output raw review false for sparse error-like text with zero exit code
getSummaryDecision requires raw review for command-output with non-zero exit code
getSummaryDecision requires raw review for command-output with dense error signals
runCommand classifies missing executables as command failures with raw review required
summarizeRequest queues request artifacts on the terminal status post and persists them asynchronously for successful calls
summary succeeds when deferred artifact persistence is unavailable
command-output never surfaces unsupported_input for non-empty input
provider failures hard fail instead of falling back to a deterministic raw excerpt
empty structured output retries once then fails, and subsequent requests still run
